zh.Lesslyn, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Mure於1225年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，她的父親Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan25歲，母親Isabel de Comyn21歲。她於1244年與Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1280年在英國蘇格蘭享年55歲。

zh-hans.Lesslyn, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Mure于1225年出生在苏格兰費伏时，她的父亲Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan25岁，母亲Isabel de Comyn21岁。她于1244年与Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1280年在英国苏格兰享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of Katherine , derived from the pet form Kit + the hypocoristic suffix -y. It is also used as an independent given name.

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Mure was born in 1225, in Fife, Scotland, her father, Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan, was 25 and her mother, Isabel de Comyn, was 21. She married Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie in 1244. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1280, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Mure est née en 1225, à Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Comyn, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie en 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1280, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Mure 1225 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan 25 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Comyn 21. Sie hat 1244 Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1280 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Mure è nata il nel 1225 nel Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Comyn, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie nel 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1280, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Mureが1225年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallanは25歳，母Isabel de Comynは21歳であった。1244年にNorino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1280年にイギリススコットランドで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Mure(이)가 1225년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Comyn(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1244년 Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Mure nasceu em 1225, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Comyn, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie em 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1280, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Mure родилась в 1225 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Comyn, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie в 1244 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1280 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Mure nació en 1225, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabel de Comyn, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Norino Leslie 4th of Leslie, Constable of Inverurie en 1244. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1280, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
